title: Marbella Speedboat Hire by the Hour: Costs, Options & Tips for 2026
html:
Speedboat hire by the hour in Marbella lets you explore the Costa del Sol at your own pace, with prices starting from around €250 per hour for a modern motorboat. Depart from Puerto Banús or Marbella Marina and head to Cabopino or the coast near Fuengirola. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners for a seamless booking experience.

What is the hourly rate for speedboat hire in Marbella?

Hourly rates for speedboat hire in Marbella typically range from €250 to €800 depending on size and power. A 20-foot RIB costs about €250 per hour, while a 40-foot luxury speedboat can exceed €600 per hour. For the best deals, compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to see real-time availability and price comparisons.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella offers several excellent launch points for speedboat hire. Puerto Banús is the most famous marina, bustling with superyachts and waterfront restaurants. Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella) provides easy access to beaches like Nagüeles and Fontanilla. Other options include Cabopino Marina near Artola, the port of Fuengirola to the east, and the small harbour at Estepona to the west. For island explorers, Isla Margarita and the waters off Marbellas coastline are short cruises away.

Which boat to rent for an hourly speedboat trip?

  1. RIB speedboat, Best for high-speed thrills and families, seating 6, 8 guests, from €250 per hour.
  2. Sports cruiser (e.g., Axopar 28), Versatile and comfortable, ideal for 8, 10 people, from €350 per hour.
  3. Luxury speedboat (e.g., Sunseeker or Azimut), Perfect for a premium experience with style, up to 12 guests, from €600 per hour. View this motor yacht for an example of a high-end option available for hourly hire.
  4. Small motorboat (open bow), Great for two couples or a small group, 4, 6 guests, from €200 per hour.

How much does it cost to hire a speedboat in Marbella?

  • Shared tour per person: from €80 per person for a 2-hour RIB ride.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €600, €900 for up to 6 guests.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €1,200, €2,500 for 10, 20 guests, but hourly hires are rarely available.
  • Crewed luxury speedboat (hourly): from €500 per hour with skipper, up to 12 guests.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Marbella?

For most speedboats up to 15 metres, a valid ICC or equivalent licence is required, but smaller RIBs can be hired without one if they are under a certain power threshold. The operator will confirm exact requirements for each boat. In high season (June to September), the Poniente wind can make afternoon seas choppy, so book morning slots for calmer conditions.

Charter early in the morning to avoid the midday Levante swell, and pack a light jacket even in summer, sea breezes can be brisk off the Marbella coast.

At a glance

  • Price range: €200, €800 per hour for speedboats
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 1, 8 hours, most popular 2, 4 hours
  • Guest capacity: 4, 12 passengers
  • Currency: EUR (quoted throughout)

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a speedboat in Marbella without a licence?

Yes, some smaller RIBs under a certain engine power can be hired without a licence, but larger speedboats require a recognised boating licence such as an ICC or Spanish Patrón.

What is the best time of year for speedboat hire in Marbella?

The summer months from June to September offer the best weather, with July and August being the warmest; spring and autumn are also pleasant with fewer crowds.

How far can I cruise in one hour from Marbella?

A 30-knot speedboat can cover about 10 nautical miles in one hour, enough to reach Cabopino or the Punta de Calaburra lighthouse from Puerto Banús.

Are there any restrictions on where I can take a hire boat?

Most owners restrict navigation along the coast within a few miles of the marina; the open Mediterranean beyond the bay of Marbella usually requires a crewed charter.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
